nasb.text: Also if anyone competes as an athlete, he does not win the prize unless he competes according to the rules.

esv.text: An athlete is not crowned unless he competes according to the rules.

cnv.text: 競賽的人若不遵守規則，就不能得冠冕。

ccb.text: 同样，参加比赛的人若不遵守比赛规则，就不可能得奖。

csbs.text: 同样，如果有人要参加竞赛，除非按着规矩去竞赛，否则就不能得冠冕。
